description_long: This object is a lever-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a wooden full stock. The barrel and receiver are metallic, with a matte gray finish, and the stock and fore-end are made of light-colored wood. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The shotgun has a simple, unadorned design with no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a continuous loop for operation. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long gray barrel, light wood full stock, and a rounded lever-integrated trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and prominent lever loop.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the wooden fore-end beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the lever, trigger guard, and stock profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long cylindrical barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, integrated with the lever, forming a continuous loop
